title: Witcher - RPG Series Loot Compat
description: Datapack for Modpack Devs. This Datapack adds exclusive Witcher Loot to the RPG Series Loot Tags.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HwYWV9gt/images/0c6f1dc9d09ed072958bb2a30ecfd20e7692233c.png)

### 🚨Required Mods
[Witcher (More RPG Classes)](https://modrinth.com/mod/witcher-rpg-class)

This optional datapack was mainly created for Modpack Devs, to enable exclusive Witcher Equipment in the RPG Series Loot Injection if this is wanted.
![Wither Witcher Equipment Loot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HwYWV9gt/images/c64e70c1eda069547d7c3bd1a93b0343ca4599fa.png)

**The following exclusive Equipment gets injected with this datapack:**
- Relic Witcher Swords
- Glyphs
- Trinkets
- Witcher Medallions
- Witcher School Armor
